final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) featuring bubble tea, targeting a pink feminine aesthetic with summer refreshment vibes.

Style/medium: lifestyle product photography, soft feminine aesthetic, influencer-style flat lay
Composition: top-down flat lay, centered bubble tea cup, generous negative space for text overlay, 4:3 aspect ratio
Subject: tall clear plastic cup of milk tea with tapioca pearls visible at bottom, condensation droplets on cup surface
Scene/backdrop: pastel pink surface or marble, scattered ice cubes, fresh mint leaves, maybe a straw with decorative paper
Lighting/mood: bright soft daylight, diffused natural light, airy and refreshing summer mood
Color palette: soft pink as dominant base, creamy beige from tea, dark brown pearls as contrast, mint green accent
Materials/textures: glossy wet plastic cup, chewy tapioca pearls, frosty condensation, matte paper straw
Constraints: must work as a thumbnail at small sizes; text-safe area in upper third for title overlay
Avoid: dark shadows, cluttered composition, realistic human hands, generic stock photo look, oversaturated neon colors
